data.title: As a practitioner, I can trust that bug reporting validation is tested end-to-end
data.description:
## Done Definitions

- Integration test: creates a ticket with non-conforming title and description missing required headers, asserts warnings emitted to stderr, exit code 0, ticket persisted
- Smoke test: invokes /dso:create-bug skill with a realistic bug scenario, asserts generated ticket contains Expected Behavior and Actual Behavior headers
- Actionable remediation test: creates a ticket without required headers, captures stderr warning text, asserts warning includes (a) ticket edit command syntax, (b) specific missing header names, (c) path to bug report template

## Scope

In: Three test types covering warning plumbing, skill output quality, and remediation guidance content.
Out: Template creation (Story 1), CLI validation (Story 2), skill creation (Story 3).

## Considerations

- Tests depend on Stories 2 and 3 being complete (CLI validation and skill must exist)

## Escalation Policy

Autonomous — Agents proceed with best judgment at all times. Reasonable assumptions are made and documented. No escalation for uncertainty.
